sections.paragraph:
[fut. יֶחֱסֶה and יֶחְסֶה] properly to flee (see the root חוּשׁ ), specially to take refuge, to flee some where for refuge, followed by בְּ of the place, as בְּצֵל פּ׳ under the shadow (protection) of some one, Jud. 9:15 Isa 30:2 בְּצֵל כַּנְפֵי יְיָ under the shadow of the wings of God, Psa 57:2 61:5 hence to trust in some one, especially in God, followed by בְּ, Psa 2:12 5:12 7:2 25:20 31:2 37:40 , etc. Absol. Psal. 17:7 . Pro 14:32, חֹסֶה בְמֹותֹו צַדִּיק “the righteous confides (in God) in his death,” i.e. when dying, or as about to die.

Derivatives, חָסוּת, מַחֲסֶה, מַחֲסֵיָה, and-
